title: White Eye
desc: A man distressed after losing his bicycle finds it near a building and confronts its new owner, who claims that he bought it a week back. Soon, the local police get involved.

title: Decision
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Voicee
desc: A local criminal accidentally sets Voicee, an AI created for military use on loose. The test voice commanding application spreads to other phones and makes him perform dangerous tasks.

title: Destiny
desc: A clock-obsessed man wakes up to a perfect routine, only to be hit by a bus. He awakens again, seconds behind his previous self, facing a relentless loop where he must save himself or repeat his fate.

title: Friday Night
desc: Three rich teenage girls sneak off to paint the town red. When their taxi ends up on the outskirts of town, they not only have to deal with the Indian underclasses, but also with each other.

title: 10x10 Ft
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Neem Jamun
desc: A young boy and his grandmother go on a journey despite family disapproval.

title: Steel Will
desc: A multiple award-winning cyberpunk sport drama. A boxer loses an arm in a car wreck so a mechanical one is grafted on in its place but future fights may cost him his family and humanity.

title: Counting Backwards
desc: A tragic incident from Sally's past is ruining her relationship with her daughter. Soon, a guilt-ridden friend of Sally decides to help heal the duo's broken relationship.

title: Unexpected Item
desc: Sometimes you get more than you pay for, but life advice from a self-service check-out is probably the strangest deal you'll get in the supermarket today.

title: A Ghost Story
desc: A caregiver pays a final visit to a terminally ill individual during the pandemic lockdown. During his final moments, he recounts the story of encountering a gentle ghost.

title: Pop
desc: Stephen Graham stars in this gripping drama. A young boy is exploring his identity, when he befriends a local man, recently released from prison. However, his past may endanger them both.

title: Charlie Surfer
desc: A charming, multiple award-winning documentary. A filmmaker follows Charlie Clay, a young boy with Asperger's syndrome, as he spends the summer learning to surf.

title: The Bridge at the Brogs
desc: A small isolated village, once a flourishing place inhabited by fantastic creatures and plants, becomes forgotten due to modernity taking over.

title: Innermost
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Merged With The Ground
desc: a father who healed his son illness but did not recover so in the end he used an unusual way to heal his son.

title: Atlantic Crossing
desc: A deeply moving drama. A young Nigerian woman is at a major crossroads in her life: should she honour her father's desire for her to be an obedient daughter or follow her heart?

title: Dint Of Perseverance
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Perception
desc: A psychological thriller based on a woman's inner fear and loneliness.

title: Midnight At Two
desc: Prakhar and Megha, two strangers undergoing similar hardships and oblivious to each other's existence, share an overwhelming moment of silence without even realising it.

title: Almond Roses
desc: Nayana, a new girl in the city, meets an old acquaintance, Ambika, and they spend time exploring the city. As nostalgia overwhelms them, they find comfort in each other.

title: Sandhya
desc: After spending years with his wife, a widower grapples with loneliness and grief. He must make a conscious choice to go on living while letting go of her.

title: A Christmas Story In Kingston
desc: Some teens are saving to pay for concert tickets until one of them is inspired to share the true meaning of Christmas.

title: Mommy's Sleeping
desc: Ada is charmed by the subtle limit that separates reality and memory, letting the nostalgic memories of her father mix with the simple sound of everyday life.

title: Messengers of Peace
desc: Two decades after a massacre orchestrated by paramilitaries at the behest of the state, the people of Acteal honour their martyrs and demand justice.

title: Welcome to the Powder Keg
desc: Tommy takes up underworld bare knuckle fighting so he can take care of his mother.

title: Neethee: Justice Prevails
desc: A wife discovers that her paedophile husband has been regularly misbehaving with the young daughter of her close friend.

title: Shallow
desc: A sincere police officer tries to save hostages from a sociopath under the pressure of his senior officers.

title: White Eye
desc: A man distressed after losing his bicycle finds it near a building and confronts its new owner, who claims that he bought it a week back. Soon, the local police get involved.

title: Dusk
desc: A young Nepalese sex worker in the red light district of Kolkata heads out with her intimate client to watch the sunset over the river.

title: Crumpled
desc: Unable to eloquently or accurately represent his thoughts on paper, Anand, the writer, crumples numerous sheets of paper.

title: Parampara
desc: A poor man decides to leave his traditional occupation in order to earn a better living and fulfil his children's desire to receive proper education.

title: Fikkr - Poetry On No Smoking
desc: Fikkr is a tragic poetry about the after effects and the grievances of a family when a tragedy hits as a result of smoking.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Charlie
desc: An honest man becomes unwittingly involved in various hilarious misadventures as he struggles to get by in a dishonest world.

title: Phone Call
desc: A lady whose only child gets kidnapped and she starts getting ransom calls. She does every task as told by the caller but the end was stranger than she thought.

title: Cast in India
desc: Cast aside as a mundane yet necessary part of people's lives, manhole covers and their makers share a similar destiny as they work in the harshest of situations.

title: This Or That
desc: A boy receives a mysterious box containing a game on his doorstep. However, there is no option of ending it and he is faced with difficult decisions.

title: Do This For Me
desc: Taj Atwal, Adelle Leonce and Tilly Keeper star in this emotionally evocative drama. A group of friends reminisce about the past and record heartfelt messages for an absent friend.

title: Gullu
desc: A man who loses his phone and teams up with a taxi driver who carries an imaginary phone in order to find it. Their search leads them to discover unexpected connections in the real world.

title: Good girl
desc: A girl with Jamaican roots finds herself in a dilemma when she is forced to choose between being a good student and embracing her rebellious streak.

title: Stuck - Part 1 & 2
desc: Experience the gripping thriller, So Stuck, where Ruchi is trapped in a perplexing predicament. Uncover the mystery of repetitive situations in this captivating short film.

title: Gone Camping
desc: A hilarious and endearing family comedy. An awkward teenage girl is excited to go to a friend's sleepover but her mother derails her plans but insisting they go on a bonding experience.

title: Bird Lady
desc: A girl wanders for miles, shoeless and confused, until she stumbles on a house full of birds and the old lady who cares for them.

title: Storage
desc: An unforgettable, award-winning horror. A woman wakes up in a strange basement with no recollection as to how she got there. That's when she discovers that she's not alone.

title: Animal Behaviour
desc: Five animals meet regularly to share their problems in group therapy sessions led by Dr Clement, a canine psychotherapist.

title: Fire Extinguisher
desc: When required to install a fire extinguisher in her chapel, Milagros must have it approved by a very special superior.

title: Middle Watch
desc: A shattering encounter threatens to tip the balance of sailor's delicate state of mind.

title: My Nephew Emmett
desc: At 2:30 a.m. on Aug. 28, 1955, in the most racially divided state in the country, 64-year-old Mose Wright tries to protect his 14-year-old nephew Emmett Till from two racists who are out for blood.

title: The Suitcase
desc: The ordinary life of Joe, a baggage handler based in an airport in Boston, is turned upside down when he steals a suitcase containing terrorist plans.

title: Notun Dhora
desc: A boy living in an alcoholic family has a lovely connection with his father when he is not drunk.

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.

title: Fit India
desc: Ganika, a young woman from a middle class Indian family, is dismissed by the prospective grooms and their families that visit her.
